clusters.justification: These terms map onto the salience and subcortical limbic circuitries, representing the macroscopic domain of processing emotional valence, arousal, and mood states.
Anchored in the striatal and ventromedial prefrontal reward circuitries, this domain represents the macro-level computation of stimulus worth, reward anticipation, and goal-directed choice.
These terms reflect the default mode network's role in internally generated, abstract representations of agents, encompassing both self-referential memory and the interpretation of others' minds.
